turns.speaker: Project Manager
turns.text: We need to decide how the remote control should handle battery life, power consumption, and charging options.

turns.speaker: Hardware Engineer
turns.text: The prototype can use two AAA batteries, but rechargeable cells may make the device more expensive.

turns.speaker: UI Designer
turns.text: The interface should warn users before the battery is empty.

turns.speaker: Marketing Expert
turns.text: Customer interviews show that users care about price, simplicity, and whether the remote looks modern.

turns.speaker: Industrial Designer
turns.text: We should compare competitor products and prepare a design brief for the next prototype.

turns.speaker: UI Designer
turns.text: The remote control should have clear buttons for volume, channel selection, and a simple menu navigation key.

turns.speaker: Project Manager
turns.text: The team agreed that usability is more important than adding too many advanced features.
